raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, My name is XXXX XXXX. I am a XXXX yr old lady who has a couple of Macys store credit cards. XXXX card ending in XXXX was filed fraudulant activities of XXXX. I filed a complaint with CFPB and Macys wrote me a letter a week later saying they reversed all those charges. I was happy thinking that everything solved but soon I got another billing statement from them, this time it was in the amount of XXXX into my second Macys credit card ending in XXXX which I already closed. I called to question but I got no answer. Looks like they transfer the fraudulent amount from the first credit account to the second account. Please help me with this once more. 
I deeply appreciate your time. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
